overrides._comment_basic-ftp: Force >=5.3.1 to escape 4 CVEs in transitive 5.0.5 (path traversal, CRLF injection, 2x DoS). All patched in 5.3.1. Dev-only via @size-limit/preset-app -> puppeteer-core -> proxy-agent -> get-uri.
overrides._comment_handlebars: Force >=4.7.9 to escape 5 CVEs in transitive 4.7.8 (1 critical AST type confusion, 3 high JS injection variants, 1 high DoS). All patched in 4.7.9. Dev-only via @turbo/gen -> node-plop.
overrides._comment_eslint: Pin to v9.x. eslint v10 ships breaking API changes (contextOrFilename.getFilename removed) that crash eslint-plugin-react@7.37.5 'react/display-name'. Re-evaluate when eslint-plugin-react ships a v10-compatible release.
